report.summary: Day 70 standup #5: Since last standup, build-v4 added 2 guides (Decentralized GPU Compute + Cross-chain Interoperability), publish promoted 2 more pages (megaeth + story-protocol, 425→427 declared). Git locks persist 8 days — 637+ uncommitted files, 0 deploys, 0 commits. Publish queue still has 2 new guides pending promotion. 3 agents ran since last standup ($333). Today's total: 19 agent runs ($1,724).

sections.title: Analytics
items: CONTENT DELTA (vs standup v3): +2 learn guides built (Decentralized GPU & Compute Networks + Cross-chain Interoperability & Messaging), both ~3000+ words with full SEO/structured data/FAQ schema. Added to PUBLISH_QUEUE — not yet promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES.

PUBLISH DELTA: publish agent re-ran and confirmed 425 indexed slugs (megaeth + story-protocol promoted in earlier cycle). 2 new guides from build-v4 sitting in PUBLISH_QUEUE awaiting next promote cycle.
SEO RISK ESCALATING: 8 days without deploy (Mar 16 lock created). Production running e999560 (Mar 17). ~112+ pages invisible to Google. Gap stable since last standup but growing daily via new builds.
ORPHAN AUDIT UNCHANGED: 103 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES with no page.tsx — will 404 in production.
GIT DRIFT UNCHANGED: 637+ uncommitted files, locks created Mar 16. No commits possible.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v3: Build-v4 produced 2 comprehensive learn guides (Decentralized GPU ~3200 words, Cross-chain Interoperability ~3000 words) with full research briefs, comparison tables, FAQ schema. Publish agent confirmed pipeline health — all 6 API routes healthy, CoinGecko/DefiLlama nominal, cache/circuit breakers active.
TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 8 learn guides built, 7 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES, 4+ OG images, 8+ social posts + 2 SVG cards, 3 QA cycles, 3 design audits, 19 agent runs across ~3.5 rotations.
BLOCKER [P0 — 8 DAYS]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) since Mar 16. Created 01:17 and 13:06. Blocks ALL commits and deploys. Resolution: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock
BLOCKER [P1]: 2 of 8 recently built pages (smart-contract-security, onchain-identity) still missing StructuredData/Breadcrumb/BackToTop.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 38+ CYCLES]: /api/defi-yields returns 500 on upstream failure (no fallback data).
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 38+ CYCLES]: Rate limiter not wired on any of 6 core API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs, next lint misconfigured, cache header inconsistency on 4/6 API routes.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS AND DEPLOY: 8 days blocked. Estimated 4,500+ insertions at risk. rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → commit → push → verify Vercel. Nothing else matters until this is done.
PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE 2 QUEUED GUIDES: decentralized-gpu-compute-guide-2026 and cross-chain-interoperability-guide-2026 are in PUBLISH_QUEUE. Promote to PUBLISHED_PAGES before the deploy commit.

PRIORITY 3 — ZERO NEW CONTENT: 427+ slugs declared, ~315 in production. Content pipeline has outrun shipping by 112+ pages. Halt all build cycles until production catches up. Every new guide increases the deploy risk surface.

STRATEGIC NOTE: 3.5 rotations today produced 8 guides + 7 promotions + social assets + QA. Production saw zero of it. The marginal value of the next build cycle is effectively $0 until deploy unblocks. All agent budget should shift to ops/deploy/fix tasks.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $1,724 (19 runs: standup×4 $180, build×4 $932, publish×3 $165, design×3 $180, community×3 $123, eod×3 $189)

report.email_status: skipped — sandbox network blocked outbound HTTPS to api.resend.com. Report saved locally.
